query:
ALTER TABLE `ordensServico`
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `tempoTotalMinutos` int DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `custoMaoObra` decimal(15,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `tipoOs` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `audit_log` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `entidade` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `entidadeId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `acao` enum('criacao','edicao','exclusao') NOT NULL,
  `usuarioId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `usuarioNome` varchar(200) DEFAULT NULL,
  `valorAnterior` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `valorNovo` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `camposAlterados` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `descricao` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `audit_log_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `audit_log_usuarioId_users_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`usuarioId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
